title: Payment API timeout spike
description: Checkout requests are timing out due to upstream failures in the payment-service.

logs.message: POST /checkout returned 504 because upstream payment-service timed out after 5000ms
Failed to acquire DB connection: timeout after 5000ms
Connection pool exhausted: max_connections=10 active=10 waiting=52

alerts.message: payment-service DB connection pool exhausted for 5m
Gateway 504 rate increased due to payment-service upstream timeouts

ground_truth.correct_fix: Increase the database connection pool size in payment-service configuration. Deploy pgBouncer as a connection pooler to prevent pool exhaustion under load. Investigate why the pool was exhausted — check for connection leaks or sudden traffic spikes.
